message:
style+test: normalize assert_with_log formatting and add PathSet selection tests

Style normalization across the codebase to collapse multi-line
assert_with_log! macro invocations into single-line format for
consistency and reduced vertical space.

New tests for PathSet selection behavior:
- test_path_set_skips_unusable: Verifies PathSet.select_paths() correctly
  filters out paths with PathState::Unavailable
- test_path_set_by_priority: Tests ByPriority selection policy returns
  paths sorted by priority field, limited to specified count

Affected modules:
- channel/mpsc.rs, watch.rs: Assert formatting
- cli/*: Assert formatting across completion, error, exit, output, progress
- combinator/join.rs, map_reduce.rs, race.rs: Assert formatting + pattern destructuring
- cx/cx.rs, scope.rs: Assert formatting
- epoch.rs, fs/path_ops.rs: Assert formatting
- grpc/codec.rs, status.rs: Assert formatting
- io/*: Assert formatting across buf_reader, buf_writer, copy, split, write_permit
- lab/chaos.rs, oracle/*: Assert formatting
- transport/aggregator.rs: New PathSet tests + formatting
- types/budget.rs, cancel.rs, policy.rs: Assert formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,8 @@ rmp-serde = "1.3"
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"
 socket2 = "0.6"
+libc = "0.2"
+nix = { version = "0.29", features = ["fs"] }
 # NOTE: bincode 1.3.3 is marked unmaintained (RustSec-2025-0141) but stable.
 # Consider migration to postcard in future. See UPGRADE_LOG.md for details.
 bincode = "1.3"

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+# Database
+*.db
+*.db-shm
+*.db-wal
+
+# Lock files
+*.lock
+
+# Temporary
+last-touched
+*.tmp

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
